Deprecated API

Contents

  • Interfaces
  • Classes
  • Methods
  • Deprecated Interfaces
    Interface
    Description
    com.jcabi.xml.XSD
    This class is deprecated since 0.31.0. Instead, you can use StrictXML with a schema provided in the constructor. Otherwise, you can use XMLDocument and validate the XML against the schema via the XMLDocument.validate(XML) method.
  • Deprecated Classes
    Class
    Description
    com.jcabi.xml.XSDDocument
    This class is deprecated since 0.31.0. Instead, you can use StrictXML with a schema provided in the constructor. Otherwise, you can use XMLDocument and validate the XML against the schema via the XMLDocument.validate(XML) method.
  • Deprecated Methods
    Method
    Description
    com.jcabi.xml.SaxonDocument.node()
    com.jcabi.xml.StrictXML.node()
    Use StrictXML.inner() or StrictXML.deepCopy() instead.
    com.jcabi.xml.XML.node()
    Use XML.inner() or XML.deepCopy() instead.
    com.jcabi.xml.XMLDocument.node()
    Use XMLDocument.inner() or XMLDocument.deepCopy() instead.
